title: Comically Large Items
description: A resource pack that makes every item comically oversized.
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2517ca4692aef6f082d210de5528371dcd8b253.png)
Tired of tiny swords and boring pickaxes? This resource pack makes every single Minecraft item HUGE. Giant swords, massive pickaxes, oversized tools, and many more… Works perfectly in vanilla Minecraft.
